---
title: "Shivam Pathak"
image: profile.png
about: 
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:shivam.pathak@ucdenver.edu
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/2h1vam12
---

## Skills
* Programming in R and C++
* AI Development & Neural Agents
* Embedded Systems & Arduino

## Education
* B.S. Computer Science, University of Colorado Denver
* Senior Capstone: Project ATHENA
* Expected Graduation: May 2026

---
